title: In Portfolio > Project Info - to be able to reorder
excerpt:
Description
In Portfolio board after pressing on a project.  The  Project Info section and information widgets to be able to reorder 
What are you trying to achieve
to be able to reorder

posts.author: 2025meli (Ian)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

In Portfolio board after pressing on a project. The Project Info section and information widgets to be able to reorder

What are you trying to achieve

to be able to reorder

posts.author: mia-cxmonday (Mia Leath)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Ian! Mia here, happy 2026!

I totally hear you—having control over that visual hierarchy is key. Since the standard Project Info section is currently set in its ways, the best workaround is to create a custom Dashboard View.

This gives you total ‘drag-and-drop’ freedom to reorder your widgets. If you save this as the default view, it will apply to all projects in your portfolio so you get that consistent, organized look across the board. Hope that helps!

posts.author: 2025meli (Ian)
posts.cookedHtml: Good idea. Thanks will definitely try it out!
